name: discord-worker
description: Fun experiment with Cloudflare workers and a discord bot

scripts.check: tsc --noEmit -p src/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p test/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p e2e/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p scripts/tsconfig.json
scripts.migrate:test: wrangler d1 migrations apply discord-worker-test --env test --remote
scripts.migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply discord-worker --env prod --remote
scripts.publish:test: npm run migrate:test && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=test vite build && wrangler deploy --env test
scripts.publish:prod: npm run migrate:prod && CLOUDFLARE_ENV=prod vite build && wrangler deploy --env prod
